title: Gems and Crystals
description: Gems & Crystals - new gems, quartz growth, and biome‑based worldgen that expands Minecraft’s progression.
body:
# **Gems and Crystals**

![Gems and crystals header](https://i.imgur.com/nT9uSDz.png)

### **Expand your Minecraft world with new gems, crystals, tools, armor, and enhanced world generation.**

Gems and Crystals enriches your adventure with new materials, biome‑based ore generation, quartz growth mechanics, and complete equipment sets designed to complement vanilla progression.

---

## **New Materials**

Discover and collect a variety of unique gemstones:

- Ruby  
- Sapphire  
- Topaz  
- Amethyst *(pre‑1.17 progression)*  
- Quartz *(Overworld variant with growth blocks)*  

![Ruby, Sapphire, Emerald, Topaz, Amethyst, Quartz](https://i.imgur.com/Qu7hVMt.png)

Each material includes its own items, blocks, and worldgen features.

---

## **Tools, Armor & Horse Armor**

Forge powerful new equipment sets:

- Ruby Tools & Armor  
- Sapphire Tools & Armor  
- Emerald Tools & Armor  
- Topaz Tools & Armor  
- Amethyst Tools & Armor  
- Quartz Tools & Armor  

![Ruby Armor, Sapphire Armor, Emerald Armor, Topaz Armor, Amethyst Armor, Quartz Armor](https://i.imgur.com/IhYKxNr.png)

All materials also include **matching horse armor**.

---

## **Quartz Growth Blocks (1.5.0+)**

Quartz now features a full growth system similar to amethyst:

- Budding Quartz  
- Small Quartz Bud  
- Medium Quartz Bud  
- Large Quartz Bud  
- Quartz Cluster  

These blocks generate naturally inside **Quartz Geodes** and can be harvested normally.

---

## **World Generation**

Explore a richer overworld with biome‑specific ore generation and small/large ore variants.

### Ruby  
- Rare, deep‑underground ore  
- Found across most overworld biomes  

### Sapphire  
- Common in cold and snowy biomes  
- Appears in frozen peaks and mountain ranges  

### Topaz  
- Spawns in warm biomes: deserts, savannas, badlands, meadows, warm oceans  
- Generates higher in the world with occasional deep pockets  

### Amethyst Ore  
- Found in cave‑dense and darker biomes  
- More common in Deep Dark and underground cave systems  

### Quartz Ore  
- Overworld quartz variant  
- More common in mountainous terrain  
- **Does not generate inside geodes**

### Quartz Geodes  
- Generate similarly to vanilla amethyst geodes  
- Contain Budding Quartz, Quartz Buds, and Quartz Clusters  
- Provide renewable quartz‑themed decorative blocks  

![Ruby Ore, Sapphire Ore, Topaz Ore, Amethyst Ore, Quartz Ore](https://i.imgur.com/x73jiQ5.png)

---

## **Equipment Strength Overview**

| Material | Tier | Notes |
|---------|------|-------|
| Quartz | Below Iron | Early‑game option |
| Amethyst | Around Iron | Faster early progression |
| Topaz | Between Iron & Diamond | Mid‑game upgrade |
| Emerald | Between Diamond & Iron | Utility‑focused tier |
| Sapphire | Near Diamond+ | Biome‑specific rarity |
| Ruby | Diamond+ | High‑end gem tier |

---

## **Design Philosophy**

- Enhances — not replaces — vanilla progression  
- Rewards biome exploration  
- Each material offers tradeoffs, not strict upgrades  
- Multiple viable progression paths  

---
